---
title: "Introduction"
description: "What DraftStack does and when to use it."
---

<!-- Generated by DraftStack. Edit the blueprint or regenerate the site to change this file. -->

DraftStack keeps existing developer documentation current.

It watches merged pull requests, checks whether user-facing docs need to change, and drafts focused updates for review.

Reviewers approve useful suggestions, and DraftStack opens a draft GitHub pull request in the documentation repository.
